results.justification: TalkHier structured communication + hierarchical refinement is direct functional twin — both apply tier-graded message structure for LLM multi-agent.
Multi-agent protocol comparison catalog covers hierarchical topology with tier-graded routing — directly addresses KAVA-CIRCLE-FB design.
Agent-/role-/turn-level credit assignment is functionally equivalent to tier-graded message weighting.
MSC-based coordination DSL separating message-passing from actions covers the rotation + ack protocol component.
Inverse-entropy fusion rule dynamically weights messages based on agent confidence — functionally equivalent to tier-weighted feedback attenuation.
Hierarchical LLM+RL integration covers tier-graded structure.
Large-scale hierarchical multi-agent with tier-based scaling covers KAVA-CIRCLE-FB tier-graded design.
RL-orchestrator with adaptive prioritization is directly addressing the same problem.
